heading: Level of loan programs under Agricultural Credit Insurance Fund
label: 1929–1 Level of loan programs under Agricultural Credit Insurance Fund
text: On and after , no funds in this Act or any other Act shall be available to carry out loan programs under the Agricultural Credit Insurance Fund at levels other than those provided for in advance in appropriations Acts.October 28, 1991
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 1992, and not as part of the Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act which comprises this chapter.
